title: Enable exporting the activity log, including with filters
excerpt:
Would be great to be able to print or export the activity log to excel/word/pdf/csv etc, including any filters that you have added. 
This is good for seeing all activities done on a specific day, to a specific group or b…

posts.author: amybrand (Amy Brand)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would be great to be able to print or export the activity log to excel/word/pdf/csv etc, including any filters that you have added.

This is good for seeing all activities done on a specific day, to a specific group or by a specific person, and would help reverse any unwanted or incorrect actions.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: in addition to this, is important to log ALL automation activities, like notifications (they are not registered).

posts.author: maximepmdc (Maxime Coucke)
posts.cookedHtml: TOTALLY ! It’s the feature I need the most right now !!

posts.author: mpm0rgan (Matthew Morgan)
posts.cookedHtml: This is critical functionality for us. I need this asap!

posts.author: APSD (Allan Paine)
posts.cookedHtml: This is still an issue, 3 years later. Has anyone else found a workaround for this?

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @amybrand , @hlopezvc, @maximepmdc , @mpm0rgan , @APSD ,
As I see it’s possible now. Is it something that you need?

image815×224 15.5 KB

May I ask what is you end goal when exporing the activity log? Do you build some reporting from it?
